name: Cocktail Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Mustard (or cream or dry mustard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chili sauce, onion, water, vinegar, garlic powder, and horseradish in a blender.
2. Puree at low speed.
3. Add the remaining ingredients one at a time, blending well after each addition.
4. Allow to set for a few hours before serving.
5. Serve on potato chips or raw vegetables.
6. May also be served as a dressing on tossed salad.
Makes 2 to 3 cups.
